label: Year five — the applied version
title: COO at Blacklyne. Become Her in 2026. Bali and Dubai.
body: Chief Operating Officer at Blacklyne AI, a premium digital presence and AI search optimization studio shipping across Germany, Dubai, the UK, and the US. The applied version of the thesis the personal brand teaches. Become Her, the debut, lands in 2026 — ninety-one thousand words, twenty-two chapters, the long letter for the women already doing the work and the slow first read for the women about to begin. The geography finally matches the work.
